milestoneTitle: Phase M9.3 — Panel glass + tile idiom site-wide: lifted the Projects page (.projects-grid) and Finder wrappers (.finder-step, .finder-fork, .save-form) to the Dashboard's near-white glass tone. Hoisted the tile recipe out of .dash-panel-body scope into shared .panel-tile / .continue-row selectors so project cards and future item-rows adopt it with one class. Converted .project-card from .glass to .panel-tile — recessed tiles read as slots inside the new near-white projects panel instead of glass cards floating on the page. Added a canonical .label-debossed utility and migrated the YouTube wordmark to use it (inlined CSS rule deleted). Scope-limited per plan: tool cards stay on their current styling (M9.7 owns), lesson rows + academy course headers stay untouched (M9.4 rewrites the zones that contain them), and all modals remain on current glass (M9.9 parity pass). Dashboard's continue-row padding + inter-row hairline preserved at .dash-panel-body scope so the existing tiles render unchanged.
